products.name: The Sentinel Protocol
products.description: A sovereign, Python-based SEO automation engine designed for total search dominance. FEATURES: Autonomous sitemap generation, meta-tag injection, schema validation, and broken link detection. Executes in milliseconds. Zero dependencies. Pure speed. Deploys instantly to any static architecture.

products.name: Glass UI: Titan Edition
products.description: The complete visual source code of the Neural Matrix Citadel. A titanium-grade HTML5/CSS3 framework featuring: Real-time Matrix Rain canvas, WebGL 3D artifact rendering, 8-tier CSS variable system, and responsive Bento Grid layout. Drop-in ready for high-end digital architecture.
